lines.lyrics: I don't mind, letting you down easy, but just give it time
If it don't hurt now well just wait, just wait a while
You're not the big fish in the pond no more

lines.chords: Cm | Eb | Ab | Cm | Ab | Cm
lines.lyrics: You are what they are feeding on, So what are you gonna do, when the world don't orbit around you?
So what are you gonna do, when the world don't orbit around you?

lines.chords: Ab | Cm | Eb | Ab | Cm | Eb | Ab | Cm | Eb | Ab | Cm | Eb
lines.lyrics: Ain't it fun? Living in the real world, Ain't it good? Being all alone
Where you're from, you might be the one who's running things
Well you can ring anybody's bell and get what you want
See it's easy to ignore trouble, when you're living in your bubble
So what are you gonna do, when the world don't orbit around you?
So what are you gonna do, when nobody wants to fool with you

lines.chords: Ab | Cm | Eb | Ab | Cm | Eb | Ab | Cm | Eb | Ab | Cm | Eb
lines.lyrics: Ain't it fun? Living in the real world, Ain't it good? Being all alone
Ain't it good to be on your own? Ain't it fun you can't count on no one?
Ain't it good to be on your own? Ain't it fun you can't count on no one?

lines.chords: Ab | Cm | Eb | Ab | Cm | Eb
lines.lyrics: Ain't it fun? Living in the real world
Don't go crying to your mama, cause you're on your own in the real world
Don't go crying to your mama, cause you're on your own in the real world
Don't go crying to your mama, cause you're on your own in the real world
Don't go crying to your mama, cause you're on your own in the real world
Ain't it fun? Ain't it fun? Baby now you're one of us.
Ain't it fun? Ain't it fun? Ain't it fun? Ain't it fun?

lines.chords: Ab | Cm | Eb | Ab | Cm | Eb | Ab | Cm | Eb | Ab | Cm | Eb
lines.lyrics: Ain't it fun? Living in the real world, Ain't it good? Being all alone

lines.chords: Ab | Eb | Bb | Ab | Eb | Bb
lines.lyrics: Ain't it fun? Living in the real world ('Cause the world don't orbit around you)

lines.chords: Ab | Cm | Eb | Ab | Cm | Eb
lines.lyrics: Ain't it good? (Ain't it good?) Being all alone
Don't go crying to your mama (run to your mama)
'Cause you're on your own in the real world (don't go crying)
Don't go crying to your mama (run to your mama)
'Cause you're on your own in the real world (don't go crying)
